programmes.show_description: Little Easton Manor. The team investigate a picturesque mansion in a small village in Essex. Can they find the cause of the reported strange sounds and apparitions? S2, Ep3
Smugglers Inn. In Sussex, the team investigate a historic inn with a gruesome past. The new owners ignored the dark reputation, but strange phenomena are giving them second thoughts. S2, Ep4
Uncle Tom's Cabin. The team of paranormal experts visit an inn in Wincanton, Somerset, and witness some unusual activity. Plus, Jane finds herself at the mercy of a possible spirit. S2, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Drew and Tee head get an exclusive look at a private collection of rock 'n roll memorabilia. Drew is excited to find some very rare Led Zeppelin and Motorhead collectibles. S15, Ep11
Drew and Tee head to a family run antiques business in Yorkshire with a no-nonsense owner. He has to haggle hard, but Drew bags himself an elegant 19th century bachelor's chest. S15, Ep12
Gaby Roslin helps IT girl and socialite Victoria Hervey find her dream countryside retreat near Windsor. She has a budget of £800,000 for her peaceful home. S1, Ep6

Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep25
Drew and Tee head to a grade II listed mansion in Lincolnshire. The house is packed with items and Drew haggles for a superb 19th century chair and a decorated chinoiserie mirror. S15, Ep14
The boys stop at a salvage yard which Drew hails as the best in the country. They find a pair of beautifully crafted sundials and an overthrow believed to be from Belvoir Castle. S15, Ep15
Cotswolds. Drew finally opens his own antiques shop in his home town of Conwy. So, he goes to the Cotswolds and one of the UK's largest indoor antiques, looking for treasure. S12, Ep1
Antiques experts Charles Hanson and Christina Trevanion search for items in Cleckheaton. Plus, Christina learns about the history of Yorkshire Terriers. S19, Ep3
Christina Trevanion and Charles Hanson hunt for interesting items in Kirkby Malzeard. Who will make the most profit at the auction in Rotherham? S19, Ep4
Soft toy restorers Julie and Amanda revive a threadbare toy rabbit. Drum expert Pete restores a battered bass drum and furniture restorer Will works on a wooden church pew. S6, Ep23
A Country Retreat. Irita explores a country house full of wonders, including a huge 200-year-old 'tavern' clock. She also helps a woman sell her jewellery and glass. S1, Ep10/10

programmes.show_description: Davina and Nicky revisit a woman who was looking for her American Air Force father, and a woman searching for her birth mother and sister. S6, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit families they helped reunite to find out what has happened since and how their lives have been transformed. S6, Ep2
Pricey Mice In The Saleroom. Brothers sell their late mum's furniture. And a couple are overwhelmed by inherited heirlooms. But will a former lover's engagement ring sell? S5, Ep13
Chocks Away! Angus helps a widow in Lincoln find new homes for her late husband's aviation paintings. Plus, he finds a ring with some serious bling in Essex. S6, Ep1
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep12

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Nigel Havers. Actor Nigel Havers' roots prove very different from his usual upper-class roles. He discovers a tale of illegitimacy worthy of a period drama. S10, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit the case of an ex-Premiership footballer and his birth mother. S7, Ep3
Chilmark Manor House. A man calls the team in to investigate his childhood home in Chilmark. Having recently moved back in, he and his family have been terrified by strange events. S2, Ep6
Old School House. In Devon, the team investigate reports of strange figures and sensations in a historic 16th-century cottage. What will they discover during their stay? S2, Ep7
Nuneaton. The team head to the midlands to take on their toughest case yet. Escalating levels of terrifying and unexplainable phenomena makes the team suspect demonic activity. S2, Ep8

Back To Basics. With his new shop opening to the public, Drew needs more stock than ever. He spots a '60s Danish sofa in Malvern and a pair of tapestries in Welshpool. S12, Ep2
The X Factor. Drew seeks standout items to lure more customers to his shop. In Derbyshire, he finds a Regency picture frame, and buys a pair of Danish rattan chairs in Harrogate. S12, Ep3
